LONG NAME: ELGBLTY_GRP_CD_LTST 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
FILE(S): 
Annual DE base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 
VALUES: 
01 = Parents and Other Caretaker Relatives 
02 = Transitional Medical Assistance 
03 = Extended Medicaid due to Earnings 
04 = Extended Medicaid due to Spousal Support Collections 
05 = Pregnant Women 
06 = Deemed Newborns 
07 = Infants and Children under Age 19 
08 = Children with Title IV-E Adoption Assistance, Foster Care or
